rows.notes: Consensus across all extractors. Clearly a header with no associated monetary amounts.

Visual inspection confirms clear amounts (4 pounds, 0 shillings, 0 pence) associated with this line, making it an 'entry'. GPT-5-mini correctly identified the type and amounts, whereas Gemini-flash incorrectly classified it as a header with no amounts. Description uses Gemini-flash's transcription with the colon, which is accurate.
